tEn: InternImage: Exploring Large-Scale Vision Foundation Models with Deformable Convolutions
tZh: InternImage：利用可变形卷积探索大规模视觉基础模型
sEn: InternImage uses deformable convolution to achieve ViT-like scaling in CNNs, setting new records on COCO and ADE20K.
sZh: InternImage采用可变形卷积作为核心算子，使CNN模型像ViT一样从参数和数据增长中获益，在COCO和ADE20K上创下新纪录。
absEn: Compared to the great progress of large-scale vision transformers (ViTs) in recent years, large-scale models based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are still in an early state. This work presents a new large-scale CNN-based foundation model, termed InternImage, which can obtain the gain from increasing parameters and training data like ViTs. Different from the recent CNNs that focus on large dense kernels, InternImage takes deformable convolution as the core operator, so that our model not only has the large effective receptive field required for downstream tasks such as detection and segmentation, but also has the adaptive spatial aggregation conditioned by input and task information. As a result, the proposed InternImage reduces the strict inductive bias of traditional CNNs and makes it possible to learn stronger and more robust patterns with large-scale parameters from massive data like ViTs. The effectiveness of our model is proven on challenging benchmarks including ImageNet, COCO, and ADE20K. It is worth mentioning that InternImage-H achieved a new record 65.4 mAP on COCO test-dev and 62.9 mIoU on ADE20K, outperforming current leading CNNs and ViTs. The code will be released at https://github.com/OpenGVLab/InternImage.
absZh: 与近年来大规模视觉Transformer（ViT）的巨大进步相比，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的大规模模型仍处于早期阶段。本文提出了一种新的大规模CNN基础模型，称为InternImage，它可以像ViT一样从增加参数和训练数据中获益。与最近关注大型密集核的CNN不同，InternImage以可变形卷积为核心算子，因此我们的模型不仅具有检测和分割等下游任务所需的大有效感受野，还具有由输入和任务信息调节的自适应空间聚合能力。因此，所提出的InternImage减少了传统CNN的严格归纳偏置，使得从海量数据中学习更强、更鲁棒的具有大规模参数的模型成为可能，就像ViT一样。我们的模型在包括ImageNet、COCO和ADE20K在内的具有挑战性的基准测试中证明了其有效性。值得一提的是，InternImage-H在COCO test-dev上达到了65.4 mAP的新纪录，在ADE20K上达到了62.9 mIoU，超越了当前领先的CNN和ViT。代码将在https://github.com/OpenGVLab/InternImage 发布。

contrib.en: Proposes InternImage, a large-scale CNN foundation model using deformable convolution as core operator.
contrib.zh: 提出InternImage，一种以可变形卷积为核心算子的大规模CNN基础模型。

contrib.en: Introduces DCNv3 with shared weights, multi-group mechanism, and softmax normalization for stable training.
contrib.zh: 引入DCNv3，包含权重共享、多组机制和softmax归一化，以实现稳定训练。

contrib.en: Develops stacking and scaling rules to efficiently scale CNNs to over 1 billion parameters.
contrib.zh: 开发堆叠和缩放规则，将CNN高效扩展至超过10亿参数。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on COCO (65.4 mAP) and ADE20K (62.9 mIoU), outperforming leading ViTs.
contrib.zh: 在COCO（65.4 mAP）和ADE20K（62.9 mIoU）上取得最先进结果，超越领先的ViT。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that CNN-based models can match or exceed ViTs in large-scale settings with proper designs.
contrib.zh: 证明通过适当设计，基于CNN的模型在大规模设置下可达到或超越ViT。

contrib.en: Validates robustness to translation, rotation, and scaling, and data efficiency on limited data.
contrib.zh: 验证了对平移、旋转和缩放的鲁棒性，以及在有限数据上的数据效率。

limits.en: Latency remains an issue for DCN-based operators in high-speed downstream tasks.
limits.zh: 基于DCN的算子在高速下游任务中延迟仍是一个问题。

limits.en: Large-scale CNNs are still in early development; InternImage serves as a starting point.
limits.zh: 大规模CNN仍处于早期发展阶段；InternImage作为一个起点。

limits.en: Performance gap with top ViTs on ImageNet (~1 point) may be due to private data discrepancy.
limits.zh: 在ImageNet上与顶级ViT的性能差距（约1个点）可能源于私有数据差异。

limits.en: Throughput is lower than ConvNeXt due to DCN operator overhead.
limits.zh: 由于DCN算子开销，吞吐量低于ConvNeXt。

limits.en: Scaling rules derived from limited search space may not be optimal for all scales.
limits.zh: 从有限搜索空间导出的缩放规则可能并非对所有规模最优。

items.en: Compared to the great progress of large-scale vision transformers (ViTs) in recent years, large-scale models based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are still in an early state. This work presents a new large-scale CNN-based foundation model, termed InternImage, which can obtain the gain from increasing parameters and training data like ViTs. Different from the recent CNNs that focus on large dense kernels, InternImage takes deformable convolution as the core operator, so that our model not only has the large effective receptive field required for downstream tasks such as detection and segmentation, but also has the adaptive spatial aggregation conditioned by input and task information. As a result, the proposed InternImage reduces the strict inductive bias of traditional CNNs and makes it possible to learn stronger and more robust patterns with large-scale parameters from massive data like ViTs. The effectiveness of our model is proven on challenging benchmarks including ImageNet, COCO, and ADE20K. It is worth mentioning that InternImage-H achieved a new record 65.4 mAP on COCO test-dev and 62.9 mIoU on ADE20K, outperforming current leading CNNs and ViTs.
items.zh: 与近年来大规模视觉Transformer（ViT）取得的巨大进展相比，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的大规模模型仍处于早期阶段。本文提出了一种新的基于CNN的大规模基础模型，称为InternImage，它能够像ViT一样从参数和训练数据的增加中获益。与最近关注大密集核的CNN不同，InternImage以可变形卷积为核心算子，使得我们的模型不仅具有检测和分割等下游任务所需的大有效感受野，还具有由输入和任务信息调节的自适应空间聚合能力。因此，所提出的InternImage减少了传统CNN的严格归纳偏置，并使其能够像ViT一样从海量数据中通过大规模参数学习更强、更鲁棒的模式。我们的模型在包括ImageNet、COCO和ADE20K在内的挑战性基准上证明了其有效性。值得一提的是，InternImage-H在COCO test-dev上达到了65.4 mAP的新纪录，在ADE20K上达到了62.9 mIoU，超越了当前领先的CNN和ViT。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Comparisons of different core operators. (a) shows the global aggregation of multi-head self-attention (MHSA) [1], whose computational and memory costs are expensive in downstream tasks that require high-resolution inputs. (b) limits the range of MHSA into a local window [2] to reduce the cost. (c) is a depth-wise convolution with very large kernels to model long-range dependencies. (d) is a deformable convolution, which shares similar favorable properties with MHSA and is efficient enough for large-scale models. We start from it to build a large-scale CNN.
items.capZh: 图1：不同核心算子的比较。(a) 展示了多头自注意力（MHSA）[1]的全局聚合，其计算和内存成本在下游任务中较高，因为这些任务需要高分辨率输入。(b) 将MHSA的范围限制在局部窗口[2]内以降低成本。(c) 是具有非常大核的深度可分离卷积，用于建模长距离依赖。(d) 是可变形卷积，它与MHSA具有相似的有利特性，并且对于大规模模型足够高效。我们以此为基础构建大规模CNN。

items.en: With the remarkable success of transformers in large-scale language models [3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8], vision transformers (ViTs) [9, 2, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15] have also swept the computer vision field and are becoming the primary choice for the research and practice of large-scale vision foundation models. Some pioneers [16, 17, 18, 19, 20] have made attempts to extend ViTs to very large models with over a billion parameters, beating convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and significantly pushing the performance bound for a wide range of computer vision tasks, including basic classification, detection, and segmentation. While these results suggest that CNNs are inferior to ViTs in the era of massive parameters and data, we argue that CNN-based foundation models can also achieve comparable or even better performance than ViTs when equipped with similar operator-/architecture-level designs, scaling-up parameters, and massive data.
items.zh: 随着Transformer在大规模语言模型[3,4,5,6,7,8]中取得显著成功，视觉Transformer（ViT）[9,2,10,11,12,13,14,15]也席卷了计算机视觉领域，并成为大规模视觉基础模型研究和实践的主要选择。一些先驱者[16,17,18,19,20]尝试将ViT扩展到超过十亿参数的极大模型，击败了卷积神经网络（CNN），并显著推动了广泛计算机视觉任务（包括基本分类、检测和分割）的性能边界。虽然这些结果表明CNN在大规模参数和数据时代不如ViT，但我们认为，当配备类似的算子/架构级设计、扩展参数和海量数据时，基于CNN的基础模型也能达到与ViT相当甚至更好的性能。

items.en: To bridge the gap between CNNs and ViTs, we first summarize their differences from two aspects: (1) From the operator level [9, 21, 22], the multi-head self-attention (MHSA) of ViTs has long-range dependencies and adaptive spatial aggregation (see Fig. 1(a)). Benefiting from the flexible MHSA, ViTs can learn more powerful and robust representations than CNNs from massive data. (2) From the architecture view [9, 22, 23], besides MHSA, ViTs contain a series of advanced components that are not included in standard CNNs, such as Layer Normalization (LN) [24], feed-forward network (FFN) [1], GELU [25], etc. Although recent works [21, 22] have made meaningful attempts to introduce long-range dependencies into CNNs by using dense convolutions with very large kernels (e.g., 31×\times31) as shown in Fig. 1 (c), there is still a considerable gap with the state-of-the-art large-scale ViTs [19, 20, 16, 18, 26] in terms of performance and model scale.
items.zh: 为了弥合CNN和ViT之间的差距，我们首先从两个方面总结它们的差异：（1）从算子层面[9,21,22]，ViT的多头自注意力（MHSA）具有长距离依赖和自适应空间聚合（见图1(a)）。得益于灵活的MHSA，ViT能够从海量数据中学习比CNN更强大、更鲁棒的表示。（2）从架构角度[9,22,23]，除了MHSA，ViT还包含一系列标准CNN中未包含的先进组件，例如层归一化（LN）[24]、前馈网络（FFN）[1]、GELU[25]等。尽管最近的工作[21,22]通过使用具有非常大核（例如31×31）的密集卷积（如图1(c)所示）进行了有意义的尝试，将长距离依赖引入CNN，但在性能和模型规模方面，与最先进的大规模ViT[19,20,16,18,26]仍存在相当大的差距。

items.en: In this work, we concentrate on designing a CNN-based foundation model that can efficiently extend to large-scale parameters and data. Specifically, we start with a flexible convolution variant—deformable convolution (DCN) [27, 28]. By combining it with a series of tailored block-level and architecture-level designs similar to transformers, we design a brand-new convolutional backbone network, termed InternImage. As shown in Fig. 1, different from recently improved CNNs with very large kernels such as 31×\times31 [22], the core operator of InternImage is a dynamic sparse convolution with a common window size of 3×\times3, (1) whose sampling offsets are flexible to dynamically learn appropriate receptive fields (can be long- or short-range) from given data; (2) the sampling offsets and modulation scalars are adaptively adjusted according to the input data, which can achieve adaptive spatial aggregation like ViTs, reducing the over-inductive bias of regular convolutions; and (3) the convolution window is a common 3×\times3, avoiding the optimization problems and expensive costs caused by large dense kernels [22, 29].
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于设计一种基于CNN的基础模型，该模型能够高效地扩展到大规模参数和数据。具体来说，我们从一种灵活的卷积变体——可变形卷积（DCN）[27,28]开始。通过将其与一系列类似Transformer的定制块级和架构级设计相结合，我们设计了一种全新的卷积骨干网络，称为InternImage。如图1所示，与最近改进的具有非常大核（如31×31）[22]的CNN不同，InternImage的核心算子是一种动态稀疏卷积，其常见窗口大小为3×3，（1）其采样偏移是灵活的，能够从给定数据中动态学习适当的感受野（可以是长程或短程）；（2）采样偏移和调制标量根据输入数据自适应调整，能够像ViT一样实现自适应空间聚合，减少了常规卷积的过度归纳偏置；（3）卷积窗口是常见的3×3，避免了由大密集核[22,29]引起的优化问题和昂贵成本。

items.en: With the aforementioned designs, the proposed InternImage can efficiently scale to large parameter sizes and learn stronger representations from large-scale training data, achieving comparable or even better performance to large-scale ViTs [2, 11, 30] on a wide range of vision tasks. In summary, our main contributions are as follows:
items.zh: 通过上述设计，所提出的InternImage能够高效地扩展到大的参数规模，并从大规模训练数据中学习更强的表示，在广泛的视觉任务上达到与大规模ViT[2,11,30]相当甚至更好的性能。总之，我们的主要贡献如下：

items.en: (1) We present a new large-scale CNN-based foundation model—InternImage. To our best knowledge, it is the first CNN that effectively scales to over 1 billion parameters and 400 million training images and achieves comparable or even better performance than state-of-the-art ViTs, showing that convolutional models are also a worth-exploring direction for large-scale model research.
items.zh: （1）我们提出了一种新的基于CNN的大规模基础模型——InternImage。据我们所知，它是第一个有效扩展到超过10亿参数和4亿训练图像，并达到与最先进ViT相当甚至更好性能的CNN，表明卷积模型也是大规模模型研究中值得探索的方向。

items.en: (2) We successfully scale CNNs to large-scale settings by introducing long-range dependencies and adaptive spatial aggregation using an improved 3×\times3 DCN operator, and explore the tailored basic block, stacking rules, and scaling strategies centered on the operator. These designs make effective use of the operator, enabling our models to obtain the gains from large-scale parameters and data.
items.zh: （2）我们通过使用改进的3×3 DCN算子引入长距离依赖和自适应空间聚合，成功地将CNN扩展到大规模设置，并探索了以该算子为中心的定制基本块、堆叠规则和缩放策略。这些设计有效利用了算子，使我们的模型能够从大规模参数和数据中获益。

items.en: (3) We evaluate the proposed model on representative vision tasks including image classification, object detection, instance and semantic segmentation, and compared it with state-of-the-art CNNs and large-scale ViTs by scaling the model size ranging from 30 million to 1 billion, the data ranging from 1 million to 400 million. Specifically, our model with different parameter sizes can consistently outperform prior arts on ImageNet [31]. InternImage-B achieves 84.9% top-1 accuracy trained only on the ImageNet-1K dataset, outperforming CNN-based counterparts [22, 21] by at least 1.1 points. With large-scale parameters (i.e., 1 billion) and training data (i.e., 427 million), the top-1 accuracy of InternImage-H is further boosted to 89.6%, which is close to well-engineering ViTs [2, 30] and hybrid-ViTs [20]. In addition, on COCO [32], a challenging downstream benchmark, our best model InternImage-H achieves state-of-the-art 65.4% box mAP with 2.18 billion parameters, 2.3 points higher than SwinV2-G [16] (65.4 vs. 63.1) with 27% fewer parameters as shown in Fig. 2.
items.zh: （3）我们在代表性视觉任务（包括图像分类、目标检测、实例和语义分割）上评估了所提出的模型，并通过将模型规模从3000万扩展到10亿、数据从100万扩展到4亿，与最先进的CNN和大规模ViT进行了比较。具体来说，我们的不同参数大小的模型在ImageNet[31]上一致优于先前技术。InternImage-B仅在ImageNet-1K数据集上训练就达到了84.9%的top-1准确率，比基于CNN的同类模型[22,21]至少高出1.1个百分点。在大规模参数（即10亿）和训练数据（即4.27亿）下，InternImage-H的top-1准确率进一步提升至89.6%，接近精心设计的ViT[2,30]和混合ViT[20]。此外，在具有挑战性的下游基准COCO[32]上，我们的最佳模型InternImage-H以21.8亿参数达到了最先进的65.4% box mAP，比SwinV2-G[16]（65.4 vs. 63.1）高出2.3个百分点，且参数减少27%，如图2所示。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Performance comparison on COCO of different backbones. The proposed InternImage-H achieves a new record 65.4 box AP on COCO test-dev, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art CNNs and large-scale ViTs.
items.capZh: 图2：不同骨干网络在COCO上的性能比较。所提出的InternImage-H在COCO test-dev上达到了65.4 box AP的新纪录，显著优于最先进的CNN和大规模ViT。

items.en: Vision foundation models. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) became the mainstream for visual recognition after the large-scale dataset and computation resources were available. Straining from AlexNet [33], lots of deeper and more effective neural network architectures have been proposed, such as VGG [34], GoogleNet [35], ResNet [36], ResNeXt [37], EfficientNet [38, 39], etc. In addition to the architectural design, more sophisticated convolution operations such as depth-wise convolution [40] and deformable convolution [27, 28] are formulated. By considering the advanced designs of transformers, modern CNNs showed promising performance on the vision tasks by discovering better components in macro/micro designs and introducing improved convolutions with long-range dependencies [21, 41, 42, 43] or dynamic weights [44].
items.zh: 视觉基础模型。在大规模数据集和计算资源可用后，卷积神经网络（CNN）成为视觉识别的主流。从AlexNet[33]开始，提出了许多更深、更有效的神经网络架构，如VGG[34]、GoogleNet[35]、ResNet[36]、ResNeXt[37]、EfficientNet[38,39]等。除了架构设计，更复杂的卷积操作如深度可分离卷积[40]和可变形卷积[27,28]也被提出。通过考虑Transformer的先进设计，现代CNN通过发现宏观/微观设计中更好的组件，并引入具有长距离依赖[21,41,42,43]或动态权重[44]的改进卷积，在视觉任务上显示出有前景的性能。

items.en: In recent years, a new line of vision foundation models focuses on transformer-based architecture. ViT [9] is the most representative model, which achieves great success in vision tasks thanks to global receptive fields and dynamic spatial aggregation. However, global attention in ViT suffers from expensive computational/memory complexity, especially on large feature maps, which limits its application in downstream tasks. To address this problem, PVT [10, 11] and Linformer [45] performed global attention on the downsampled key and value maps, DAT [46] employed deformable attention to sparsely sample information from value maps, while HaloNet [47] and Swin transformer [2] developed local attention mechanisms and used haloing and shift operations to transfer information among adjacent local regions.
items.zh: 近年来，一条新的视觉基础模型研究路线聚焦于基于Transformer的架构。ViT[9]是最具代表性的模型，由于全局感受野和动态空间聚合，它在视觉任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，ViT中的全局注意力在计算/内存复杂度上代价高昂，尤其是在大特征图上，这限制了其在下游任务中的应用。为了解决这个问题，PVT[10,11]和Linformer[45]在降采样的键和值图上执行全局注意力，DAT[46]采用可变形注意力从值图中稀疏采样信息，而HaloNet[47]和Swin Transformer[2]开发了局部注意力机制，并使用光环和移位操作在相邻局部区域之间传递信息。

items.en: Large-scale models. Scaling up models is an important strategy to improve feature representation quality, which has been well-studied in the natural language processing (NLP) domain [48]. Inspired by the success in the NLP field, Zhai et al. [19] first extended ViT to 2 billion parameters. Liu et al. [16] enlarged the hierarchical-structure Swin transformer to a deeper and wider model with 3 billion parameters. Some researchers developed large-scale hybrid ViTs [20, 49] by combining the advantages of ViTs and CNNs at different levels. Recently, BEiT-3 [17] further explored stronger representations based on ViT with large-scale parameters using multimodal pre-training. These methods significantly raise the upper bound of basic vision tasks. However, research on CNN-based large-scale models has lagged behind transformer-based architectures in terms of the total number of parameters and performance. Although newly-proposed CNNs [21, 41, 42, 43] introduce long-range dependencies by using convolutions with very large kernels or recursive gated kernels, there is still a considerable gap with state-of-the-art ViTs. In this work, we aim to develop a CNN-based foundation model that can extend efficiently to a large scale comparable to ViT.
items.zh: 大规模模型。扩展模型是提高特征表示质量的重要策略，这在自然语言处理（NLP）领域已得到充分研究[48]。受NLP领域成功的启发，Zhai等人[19]首先将ViT扩展到20亿参数。Liu等人[16]将层次结构的Swin Transformer扩展到更深更宽的模型，拥有30亿参数。一些研究人员通过在不同层次结合ViT和CNN的优势，开发了大规模混合ViT[20,49]。最近，BEiT-3[17]通过使用多模态预训练，进一步探索了基于ViT的大规模参数下的更强表示。这些方法显著提高了基本视觉任务的上限。然而，基于CNN的大规模模型研究在参数总数和性能方面落后于基于Transformer的架构。尽管新提出的CNN[21,41,42,43]通过使用非常大核的卷积或递归门控核引入了长距离依赖，但与最先进的ViT仍存在相当大的差距。在这项工作中，我们旨在开发一种基于CNN的基础模型，该模型能够高效地扩展到与ViT相当的大规模。

items.en: To design a large-scale CNN-based foundation model, we start with a flexible convolution variant, namely deformable convolution v2 (DCNv2) [28] and make some tune-ups based on it to better suit the requirements of large-scale foundation models. Then, we build the basic block by combining the tuned convolution operator with advanced block designs used in modern backbones [16, 19]. Finally, we explore the stacking and scaling principles of DCN-based blocks to build a large-scale convolutional model that can learn strong representations from massive data.
items.zh: 为了设计基于CNN的大规模基础模型，我们从一种灵活的卷积变体——可变形卷积v2（DCNv2）[28]开始，并基于它进行了一些调整，以更好地适应大规模基础模型的需求。然后，通过将调整后的卷积算子与现代骨干网络[16,19]中使用的先进块设计相结合，我们构建了基本块。最后，我们探索了基于DCN的块的堆叠和缩放原则，以构建一个能够从海量数据中学习强表示的大规模卷积模型。

items.en: Convolution vs. MHSA. Previous works [50, 21, 22] have extensively discussed the differences between CNNs and ViTs. Before deciding on the core operator of InternImage, we first summarize the main differences between regular convolution and MHSA.
items.zh: 卷积 vs. MHSA。先前的工作[50,21,22]广泛讨论了CNN和ViT之间的差异。在决定InternImage的核心算子之前，我们首先总结了常规卷积和MHSA之间的主要区别。

items.en: (1) Long-range dependencies. Although it has long been recognized that models with large effective receptive fields (long-range dependencies) usually perform better on downstream vision tasks [51, 52, 53], the de-facto effective receptive field of CNNs [34, 36] stacked by 3×\times3 regular convolutions is relatively small. Even with very deep models, the CNN-based model still cannot acquire long-range dependencies like ViTs, which limits its performance.
items.zh: （1）长距离依赖。尽管人们早已认识到具有大有效感受野（长距离依赖）的模型通常在下游视觉任务上表现更好[51,52,53]，但由3×3常规卷积堆叠而成的CNN[34,36]的实际有效感受野相对较小。即使使用非常深的模型，基于CNN的模型仍然无法像ViT那样获得长距离依赖，这限制了其性能。

items.en: (2) Adaptive spatial aggregation. Compared to MHSA whose weights are dynamically conditioned by the input, regular convolution [54] is an operator with static weights and strong inductive biases such as 2D locality, neighborhood structure, translation equivalence, etc. With the highly-inductive properties, models composed by regular convolutions might converge faster and require less training data than ViTs, but it also restricts CNNs from learning more general and robust patterns from web-scale data.
items.zh: （2）自适应空间聚合。与权重由输入动态调节的MHSA相比，常规卷积[54]是一种具有静态权重和强归纳偏置（如二维局部性、邻域结构、平移等价性等）的算子。由于高度归纳的特性，由常规卷积组成的模型可能比ViT收敛更快，需要的训练数据更少，但也限制了CNN从网络规模数据中学习更通用、更鲁棒的模式。

items.en: Revisiting DCNv2. A straightforward way to bridge the gap between convolution and MHSA is to introduce long-range dependencies and adaptive spatial aggregation into regular convolutions. Let us start with DCNv2 [28], which is a general variant of regular convolution. Given an input 𝐱∈ℝC×H×W𝐱superscriptℝ𝐶𝐻𝑊\mathbf{x}\!\in\!\mathbb{R}^{C\times H\times W} and current pixel p0subscript𝑝0p_{0}, DCNv2 can be formulated as:

items.en: where K𝐾K represents the total number of sampling points, and k𝑘k enumerates the sampling point. 𝐰k∈ℝC×Csubscript𝐰𝑘superscriptℝ𝐶𝐶\mathbf{w}_{k}\!\in\!\mathbb{R}^{C\times C} denotes the projection weights of the k𝑘k-th sampling point, and 𝐦k∈ℝsubscript𝐦𝑘ℝ\mathbf{m}_{k}\!\in\!\mathbb{R} represents the modulation scalar of the k𝑘k-th sampling point, which is normalized by sigmoid function. pksubscript𝑝𝑘p_{k} denotes the k𝑘k-th location of the pre-defined grid sampling {(−1,−1),(−1,0),…,(0,+1),…,(+1,+1)}1110…01…11\{(-1,-1),(-1,0),...,(0,+1),...,(+1,+1)\} as in regular convolutions, and Δ​pkΔsubscript𝑝𝑘\Delta p_{k} is the offset corresponding to the k𝑘k-th grid sampling location. We see from the equation that (1) for long-range dependencies, the sampling offset Δ​pkΔsubscript𝑝𝑘\Delta p_{k} is flexible and able to interact with short- or long-range features; and (2) for adaptive spatial aggregation, both the sampling offset Δ​pkΔsubscript𝑝𝑘\Delta p_{k} and modulation scalar 𝐦ksubscript𝐦𝑘\mathbf{m}_{k} are learnable and conditioned by input 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}. So it can be found that DCNv2 shares similar favorable properties with MHSA, which motivated us to develop large-scale CNN-based foundation models on the basis of this operator.
items.zh: 其中K表示采样点的总数，k枚举采样点。w_k∈R^(C×C)表示第k个采样点的投影权重，m_k∈R表示第k个采样点的调制标量，通过sigmoid函数归一化。p_k表示预定义网格采样{(-1,-1),(-1,0),...,(0,+1),...,(+1,+1)}中的第k个位置，与常规卷积相同，Δp_k是对应于第k个网格采样位置的偏移。从方程中我们看到：（1）对于长距离依赖，采样偏移Δp_k是灵活的，能够与短程或长程特征交互；（2）对于自适应空间聚合，采样偏移Δp_k和调制标量m_k都是可学习的，并由输入x调节。因此可以发现，DCNv2与MHSA具有相似的有利特性，这促使我们基于该算子开发大规模基于CNN的基础模型。

items.en: Extending DCNv2 for Vision Foundation Models. In common practice, DCNv2 is usually used as an extension to regular convolutions, loading pre-trained weights of regular convolutions and fine-tuning for better performance, which is not exactly suitable for large-scale vision foundation models that need to be trained from scratch. In this work, to address this problem, we extend DCNv2 from aspects as follows:
items.zh: 为视觉基础模型扩展DCNv2。在常见实践中，DCNv2通常用作常规卷积的扩展，加载常规卷积的预训练权重并进行微调以获得更好的性能，但这并不完全适合需要从头开始训练的大规模视觉基础模型。在这项工作中，为了解决这个问题，我们从以下方面扩展了DCNv2：

items.capEn: Figure 3: Overall Architecture of InternImage, where the core operator is DCNv3, and the basic block composes of layer normalization (LN) [24] and feed-forward network (FFN) [1] as transformers, the stem and downsampling layers follows conventional CNN’s designs, where “s2” and “p1” mean stride 2 and padding 1, respectively. Constrained by the stacking rules, only 4 hyper-parameters (C1,C′,L1,L3)subscript𝐶1superscript𝐶′subscript𝐿1subscript𝐿3(C_{1},C^{\prime},L_{1},L_{3}) can decide a model variant.
items.capZh: 图3：InternImage的整体架构，其核心算子为DCNv3，基本块由层归一化（LN）[24]和前馈网络（FFN）[1]组成，类似于Transformer；主干和下采样层遵循传统CNN的设计，其中“s2”和“p1”分别表示步长为2和填充为1。受堆叠规则的约束，仅需4个超参数(C1,C′,L1,L3)即可确定一个模型变体。

items.en: (1) Sharing weights among convolutional neurons. Similar to regular convolution, different convolutional neurons111A 3×\times3 regular convolution has 9 linear projection neurons. in original DCNv2 have independent linear projection weights, and thus its parameter and memory complexity are linear with the total number of sampling points, which significantly limits the efficiency of the model, especially in large-scale models. To remedy this problem, we borrow the idea from the separable convolution [55] and detach the original convolution weights 𝐰ksubscript𝐰𝑘\mathbf{w}_{k} into depth-wise and point-wise parts, where the depth-wise part is responsible by the original location-aware modulation scalar 𝐦ksubscript𝐦𝑘\mathbf{m}_{k}, and the point-wise part is the shared projection weights 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w} among sampling points.
items.zh: (1) 卷积神经元间的权重共享。与常规卷积类似，原始DCNv2中不同的卷积神经元111一个3×3常规卷积有9个线性投影神经元。具有独立的线性投影权重，因此其参数和内存复杂度与采样点总数呈线性关系，这严重限制了模型的效率，尤其是在大规模模型中。为解决此问题，我们借鉴了可分离卷积[55]的思想，将原始卷积权重w_k分解为深度可分离和逐点部分，其中深度可分离部分由原始的位置感知调制标量m_k负责，逐点部分为采样点间共享的投影权重w。

items.en: (2) Introducing multi-group mechanism. The multi-group (head) design first appeared in group convolution [33], and it is widely used in MHSA [1] of transformers and works with adaptive spatial aggregation to effectively learn richer information from different representation subspaces at different locations. Inspired by this, we split the spatial aggregation process into G𝐺G groups, each of which has individual sampling offsets Δ​pg​kΔsubscript𝑝𝑔𝑘\Delta p_{gk} and modulation scale 𝐦g​ksubscript𝐦𝑔𝑘\mathbf{m}_{gk}, and thus different groups on a single convolution layer can have different spatial aggregation patterns, resulting in stronger features for downstream tasks.
items.zh: (2) 引入多组机制。多组（头）设计首次出现在分组卷积[33]中，并广泛应用于Transformer的MHSA[1]中，与自适应空间聚合配合，有效从不同表示子空间和不同位置学习更丰富的信息。受此启发，我们将空间聚合过程拆分为G组，每组具有独立的采样偏移Δp_gk和调制尺度m_gk，因此单个卷积层上的不同组可以有不同的空间聚合模式，从而为下游任务生成更强的特征。

items.en: (3) Normalizing modulation scalars along sampling points. The modulation scalars in the original DCNv2 are element-wise normalized by the sigmoid function. Therefore, each modulation scalar is in the range [0, 1], and the sum of the modulation scalars of all sample points is not stable and varies from 0 to K𝐾K. This leads to unstable gradients in DCNv2 layers when training with large-scale parameters and data. To alleviate the instability issues, we change element-wise sigmoid normalization to softmax normalization along sample points. In this way, the sum of the modulation scalars is constrained to 1, which makes the training process of models at different scales more stable.
items.zh: (3) 沿采样点归一化调制标量。原始DCNv2中的调制标量通过sigmoid函数逐元素归一化。因此，每个调制标量在[0,1]范围内，所有采样点的调制标量之和不稳定，在0到K之间变化。这导致在大规模参数和数据训练时，DCNv2层的梯度不稳定。为缓解不稳定问题，我们将逐元素sigmoid归一化改为沿采样点的softmax归一化。这样，调制标量之和被约束为1，使得不同规模模型的训练过程更加稳定。

items.en: Combining the aforementioned modifications, the extended DCNv2, marked as DCNv3, can be formulated as Eqn. (2).
items.zh: 结合上述修改，扩展后的DCNv2（记为DCNv3）可表示为公式(2)。

items.en: where G𝐺G denotes the total number of aggregation groups. For the g𝑔g-th group, 𝐰g∈ℝC×C′subscript𝐰𝑔superscriptℝ𝐶superscript𝐶′\mathbf{w}_{g}\!\in\!\mathbb{R}^{C\times C^{\prime}} denotes the location-irrelevant projection weights of the group, where C′=C/Gsuperscript𝐶′𝐶𝐺C^{\prime}\!=\!C/G represents the group dimension. 𝐦g​k∈ℝsubscript𝐦𝑔𝑘ℝ\mathbf{m}_{gk}\!\in\!\mathbb{R} denotes the modulation scalar of the k𝑘k-th sampling point in the g𝑔g-th group, normalized by the softmax function along the dimension K𝐾K. 𝐱g∈ℝC′×H×Wsubscript𝐱𝑔superscriptℝsuperscript𝐶′𝐻𝑊\mathbf{x}_{g}\!\in\!\mathbb{R}^{C^{\prime}\times H\times W} represents the sliced input feature map. Δ​pg​kΔsubscript𝑝𝑔𝑘\Delta p_{gk} is the offset corresponding to the grid sampling location pksubscript𝑝𝑘p_{k} in the g𝑔g-th group.
items.zh: 其中G表示聚合组的总数。对于第g组，w_g∈ℝ^{C×C'}表示该组的位置无关投影权重，其中C'=C/G为组维度。m_gk∈ℝ表示第g组第k个采样点的调制标量，沿维度K通过softmax函数归一化。x_g∈ℝ^{C'×H×W}表示切片后的输入特征图。Δp_gk是第g组中对应网格采样位置p_k的偏移。

items.en: In general, DCNv3, as an extension of the DCN series, enjoys three merits as follows: (1) This operator made up for the deficiencies of regular convolution in terms of long-range dependencies and adaptive spatial aggregation; (2) Compared with attention-based operators such as common MHSA and closely-related deformable attention [56, 46], this operator inherits the inductive bias of convolution, making our model more efficient with fewer training data and shorter training time; (3) This operator is based on sparse sampling, which is more computational and memory efficient than previous methods such as MHSA [1] and re-parameterizing large kernel [22]. In addition, due to the sparse sampling, DCNv3 only needs a 3×\times3 kernel to learn long-range dependencies, which is easier to be optimized and avoids extra auxiliary techniques such as re-parameterizing [22] used in large kernels.
items.zh: 总的来说，DCNv3作为DCN系列的扩展，具有以下三个优点：(1) 该算子弥补了常规卷积在长距离依赖和自适应空间聚合方面的不足；(2) 与基于注意力的算子（如常见的MHSA和密切相关的可变形注意力[56, 46]）相比，该算子继承了卷积的归纳偏置，使得我们的模型在更少的训练数据和更短的训练时间内更高效；(3) 该算子基于稀疏采样，在计算和内存效率上优于先前的方法，如MHSA[1]和重参数化大核[22]。此外，由于稀疏采样，DCNv3仅需3×3的核即可学习长距离依赖，更容易优化，且避免了大型核中使用的额外辅助技术（如重参数化[22]）。

items.en: Using DCNv3 as the core operator brings a new problem: how to build a model that can make effective use of the core operator? In this section, we first present the details of the basic block and other integral layers of our model, and then we construct a new CNN-based foundation model termed InternImage, by exploring a tailored stacking strategy for these basic blocks. Finally, we study scaling-up rules for the proposed model to obtain the gain from increasing parameters.
items.zh: 使用DCNv3作为核心算子带来了一个新问题：如何构建一个能有效利用核心算子的模型？在本节中，我们首先介绍模型的基本块和其他必要层的细节，然后通过探索这些基本块的定制堆叠策略，构建一个新的基于CNN的基础模型，称为InternImage。最后，我们研究所提模型的缩放规则，以从增加参数中获得收益。

items.en: Basic block. Unlike the widely used bottlenecks in traditional CNNs [36], the design of our basic block is closer to ViTs, which is equipped with more advanced components including LN [24], feed-forward networks (FFN) [1], and GELU [25]. This design is proved to be efficient [10, 11, 2, 21, 22] in various vision tasks. The details of our basic block are illustrated in Fig. 3, where the core operator is DCNv3, and the sampling offsets and modulation scales are predicted by passing input feature 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} through a separable convolution (a 3×\times3 depth-wise convolution followed by a linear projection). For other components, we use the post-normalization setting [57] by default and follow the same design as that of the plain transformer [1, 9].
items.zh: 基本块。与传统CNN中广泛使用的瓶颈结构[36]不同，我们的基本块设计更接近ViT，配备了更先进的组件，包括LN[24]、前馈网络（FFN）[1]和GELU[25]。这种设计在各种视觉任务中被证明是高效的[10, 11, 2, 21, 22]。基本块的细节如图3所示，其中核心算子为DCNv3，采样偏移和调制尺度通过将输入特征x经过一个可分离卷积（一个3×3深度可分离卷积后接一个线性投影）预测得到。对于其他组件，我们默认使用后归一化设置[57]，并遵循普通Transformer[1, 9]的相同设计。

items.en: Stem & downsampling layers. To obtain hierarchical feature maps, we use convolutional stem and downsampling layers to resize the feature maps to different scales. As shown in Fig. 3, the stem layer is placed before the first stage to reduce the input resolution by 4 times. It consists of two convolutions, two LN layers, and one GELU layer, where the kernel size of the two convolutions is 3, the stride is 2, the padding is 1, and the output channel of the first convolution is half of the second one. Similarly, the downsampling layer is made up of a 3×\times3 convolution with a stride of 2 and a padding of 1, followed by one LN layer. It sits between the two stages and is used to downsample the input feature map by 2 times.
items.zh: 主干与下采样层。为获得层次化特征图，我们使用卷积主干和下采样层将特征图调整到不同尺度。如图3所示，主干层放置在第一阶段之前，将输入分辨率降低4倍。它由两个卷积、两个LN层和一个GELU层组成，其中两个卷积的核大小为3，步长为2，填充为1，第一个卷积的输出通道是第二个的一半。类似地，下采样层由一个3×3卷积（步长为2，填充为1）后接一个LN层组成。它位于两个阶段之间，用于将输入特征图下采样2倍。

items.en: Stacking rules. To clarify the block-stacking process, we first list the integral hyperparameters of the InternImage as follows: Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}: the channel number of the i𝑖i-th stage; Gisubscript𝐺𝑖G_{i}: the group number of the DCNv3 in the i𝑖i-th stage; Lisubscript𝐿𝑖L_{i}: the number of basic blocks in the i𝑖i-th stage. Since our model has 4 stages, a variant is decided by 12 hyper-parameters, whose search space is too large to exhaustively enumerate and find the best variant. To reduce the search space, we summarize the design experiences of prior arts [36, 2, 21] into 4 rules as shown in Fig. 3, where the first rule makes the channel numbers of the last three stages determined by the channel number C1subscript𝐶1C_{1} of the first stage, and the second rule lets the group number correspond to the channel number of stages. For the number of stacked blocks in different stages, we simplify the stacking pattern to “AABA”, which means the block number of stage 1, 2, and 4 are the same, and are not greater than that of the stage 3 as illustrated in the last two rules. With these rules, a InternImage variant can be defined by using only 4 hyper-parameters (C1,C′,L1,L3)subscript𝐶1superscript𝐶′subscript𝐿1subscript𝐿3(C_{1},C^{\prime},L_{1},L_{3}).
items.zh: 堆叠规则。为阐明块堆叠过程，我们首先列出InternImage的整体超参数如下：C_i：第i阶段的通道数；G_i：第i阶段DCNv3的组数；L_i：第i阶段的基本块数量。由于我们的模型有4个阶段，一个变体由12个超参数决定，其搜索空间太大，无法穷举并找到最佳变体。为减少搜索空间，我们将先前工作[36, 2, 21]的设计经验总结为4条规则，如图3所示：第一条规则使后三个阶段的通道数由第一阶段的通道数C_1决定；第二条规则使组数与阶段的通道数对应。对于不同阶段的堆叠块数量，我们将堆叠模式简化为“AABA”，即阶段1、2和4的块数相同，且不大于阶段3的块数，如最后两条规则所示。利用这些规则，一个InternImage变体仅需4个超参数(C1,C′,L1,L3)即可定义。

items.en: Let us choose a model with 30 million parameters as the origin and discretize C1subscript𝐶1C_{1} to {48,64,80}486480\{48,64,80\}, L1subscript𝐿1L_{1} to {1,2,3,4,5}12345\{1,2,3,4,5\}, and C′superscript𝐶′C^{\prime} to {16,32}1632\{16,32\}. In this way, the original huge search space is reduced to 30, and we can find the best model from the 30 variants by training and evaluating them in ImageNet [31]. In practice, we use the best hyper-parameter setting (64,16,4,18)6416418(64,16,4,18) to define the origin model and scale it to different scales.
items.zh: 我们选择一个3000万参数的模型作为起点，并将C_1离散化为{48,64,80}，L_1离散化为{1,2,3,4,5}，C'离散化为{16,32}。这样，原始巨大的搜索空间减少到30个，我们可以通过在ImageNet[31]上训练和评估这30个变体来找到最佳模型。实践中，我们使用最佳超参数设置(64,16,4,18)来定义起点模型，并将其缩放到不同规模。

items.en: Scaling rules. Based on the optimal origin model under the aforementioned constraints, we further explore the parameter scaling rules inspired by [38]. Specifically, we consider two scaling dimensions: depth D𝐷D (i.e., 3​L1+L33subscript𝐿1subscript𝐿33L_{1}\!+\!L_{3}) and width C1subscript𝐶1C_{1}, and scale the two dimensions using α𝛼\alpha, β𝛽\beta and a composite factor ϕitalic-ϕ\phi. The scaling rules can be written as: D′=αϕ​Dsuperscript𝐷′superscript𝛼italic-ϕ𝐷D^{\prime}\!=\!\alpha^{\phi}D and C1′=βϕ​C1subscriptsuperscript𝐶′1superscript𝛽italic-ϕsubscript𝐶1C^{\prime}_{1}\!=\!\beta^{\phi}C_{1}, where α≥1𝛼1\alpha\!\geq\!1, β≥1𝛽1\beta\!\geq\!1, and α​β1.99≈2𝛼superscript𝛽1.992\alpha\beta^{1.99}\!\approx\!2. Here, 1.99 is specific for InternImage and calculated by doubling the model width and keeping the depth constant. We experimentally find out that the best scaling setting is α=1.09𝛼1.09\alpha\!=\!1.09 and β=1.36𝛽1.36\beta\!=\!1.36, and then we base on it to construct InternImage variants with different parameter scales, namely InternImage-T/S/B/L/XL, whose complexity is similar to those of ConvNeXt [21]. To further test the capability, we built a larger InternImage-H with 1 billion parameters, and to accommodate very large model widths, we also change the group dimension C′superscript𝐶′C^{\prime} to 32. The configurations are summarized in Table 1.
items.zh: 缩放规则。基于上述约束下的最优起点模型，我们进一步探索受[38]启发的参数缩放规则。具体来说，我们考虑两个缩放维度：深度D（即3L1+L3）和宽度C_1，并使用α、β和一个复合因子φ来缩放这两个维度。缩放规则可写为：D'=α^φ D 和 C1'=β^φ C1，其中α≥1，β≥1，且αβ^{1.99}≈2。这里，1.99是InternImage特有的，通过将模型宽度加倍并保持深度不变计算得出。我们通过实验发现最佳缩放设置为α=1.09和β=1.36，然后基于此构建不同参数规模的InternImage变体，即InternImage-T/S/B/L/XL，其复杂度与ConvNeXt[21]相似。为进一步测试能力，我们构建了更大的InternImage-H，拥有10亿参数，为适应非常大的模型宽度，我们还将组维度C'改为32。配置总结于表1。

items.en: We analyze and compare InternImage with the leading CNNs and ViTs on representative vision tasks including image classification, object detection, instance and semantic segmentation. Besides the experiments in the main paper, due to space constraints, more experimental setups and ablation studies are presented in the supplementary material.
items.zh: 我们在代表性视觉任务（包括图像分类、目标检测、实例和语义分割）上分析和比较InternImage与领先的CNN和ViT。除主论文中的实验外，由于空间限制，更多实验设置和消融研究见补充材料。

items.en: Settings. We evaluate the classification performance of InternImage on ImageNet [31]. For fair comparisons, following common practices [58, 10, 2, 21], InternImage-T/S/B are trained on ImageNet-1K (∼similar-to\sim1.3 million) for 300 epochs, and InternImage-L/XL are first trained on ImageNet-22K (∼similar-to\sim14.2 million) for 90 epochs and then fine-tuned on ImageNet-1K for 20 epochs. To further explore the capability of our model and match the large-scale private data used in previous methods [20, 16, 59], we adopt M3I Pre-training [60], a unified pre-training approach available for both unlabeled and weakly-labeled data, to pre-train InternImage-H on a 427 million joint dataset of public Laion-400M [61], YFCC-15M [62], and CC12M [63] for 30 epochs, and then we fine-tune the model on ImageNet-1K for 20 epochs.
items.zh: 设置。我们在ImageNet[31]上评估InternImage的分类性能。为公平比较，遵循常见做法[58, 10, 2, 21]，InternImage-T/S/B在ImageNet-1K（约130万）上训练300个epoch，InternImage-L/XL先在ImageNet-22K（约1420万）上训练90个epoch，然后在ImageNet-1K上微调20个epoch。为进一步探索模型能力并与先前方法[20, 16, 59]中使用的大规模私有数据匹配，我们采用M3I预训练[60]（一种适用于无标签和弱标签数据的统一预训练方法），在包含Laion-400M[61]、YFCC-15M[62]和CC12M[63]的4.27亿联合公共数据集上预训练InternImage-H 30个epoch，然后在ImageNet-1K上微调20个epoch。

items.en: Results. Table 2 shows the classification results of models with different scales. With similar parameters and computational costs, our models are comparable or even superior to the state-of-the-art transformer-based and CNN-based models. For example, InternImage-T achieves 83.5% top-1 accuracy, outperforming ConvNext-T [21] with a clear margin of 1.4 points. InternImage-S/B keeps the leading position and InternImage-B surpasses the hybrid-ViT CoAtNet-2 [20] by 0.8 points. When pre-trained on ImageNet-22K and the large-scale joint dataset, the top-1 accuracy of InternImage-XL and -H are boosted to 88.0% and 89.6%, respectively, which is better than previous CNNs [67, 22] also trained with large-scale data, and closes the gap with the state-of-the-art large-scale ViTs to about 1 point. This gap may be caused by the discrepancy between large-scale inaccessible private data and the aforementioned joint public data. These results show that our InternImage not only has good performance on the common parameter scale and the public training data, but also can effectively extend to large-scale parameters and data.
items.zh: 结果。表2显示了不同规模模型的分类结果。在相似参数和计算成本下，我们的模型与最先进的基于Transformer和基于CNN的模型相当甚至更优。例如，InternImage-T达到83.5%的top-1准确率，以1.4个百分点的明显优势超过ConvNext-T[21]。InternImage-S/B保持领先地位，InternImage-B超过混合ViT CoAtNet-2[20] 0.8个百分点。当在ImageNet-22K和大规模联合数据集上预训练时，InternImage-XL和-H的top-1准确率分别提升至88.0%和89.6%，优于先前同样使用大规模数据训练的CNN[67, 22]，并将与最先进大规模ViT的差距缩小到约1个百分点。这一差距可能源于大规模不可访问的私有数据与上述联合公共数据之间的差异。这些结果表明，我们的InternImage不仅在常见参数规模和公共训练数据上表现良好，而且能有效扩展到大规模参数和数据。

items.en: Settings. We verify the detection performance of our InternImage on the COCO benchmark [32], on top of two representative object detection frameworks: Mask R-CNN [70], and Cascade Mask R-CNN [71]. We follow common practices [2, 11] to initialize the backbone with pre-trained classification weights, and train models use a 1×\times (12 epochs) or 3×\times (36 epochs) schedule by default.
items.zh: 设置。我们在COCO基准[32]上验证InternImage的检测性能，使用两个代表性目标检测框架：Mask R-CNN[70]和Cascade Mask R-CNN[71]。我们遵循常见做法[2, 11]，使用预训练的分类权重初始化主干，并默认使用1×（12个epoch）或3×（36个epoch）的训练计划。

items.en: Results. As shown in Table 3, when using Mask R-CNN for object detection, we find that under a comparable number of parameters, our models significantly surpass their counterparts. For example, with the 1×1\times training schedule, the box AP (APb) of InternImage-T is 4.5 points better than Swin-T [2] (47.2 vs. 42.7), and 3.0 points higher than ConvNeXt-T [21] (47.2 vs. 44.2). With the 3×\times multi-scale training schedule, more parameters, and more advanced Cascade Mask R-CNN [71], InternImage-XL achieves APb of 56.2, surpassing ConvNeXt-XL by 1.0 points (56.2 vs. 55.2). Similar results are also seen in instance segmentation experiments. With the 1×\times training schedule, InternImage-T yields 42.5 mask AP (i.e., APm), which outperforms Swin-T and ConvNeXt-T by 3.2 points (42.5 vs. 39.3) and 2.4 points (42.5 vs. 40.1), respectively. The best APm 48.8 is obtained by InternImage-XL with Cascade Mask R-CNN, which is at least 1.1 points higher than its counterparts.
items.zh: 结果。如表3所示，当使用Mask R-CNN进行目标检测时，我们发现，在参数数量相当的情况下，我们的模型显著优于对应模型。例如，在1×训练计划下，InternImage-T的框AP（APb）比Swin-T[2]高4.5个点（47.2 vs. 42.7），比ConvNeXt-T[21]高3.0个点（47.2 vs. 44.2）。在3×多尺度训练计划、更多参数和更先进的Cascade Mask R-CNN[71]下，InternImage-XL达到56.2的APb，超过ConvNeXt-XL 1.0个点（56.2 vs. 55.2）。类似结果也出现在实例分割实验中。在1×训练计划下，InternImage-T产生42.5的掩码AP（即APm），分别超过Swin-T和ConvNeXt-T 3.2个点（42.5 vs. 39.3）和2.4个点（42.5 vs. 40.1）。最佳APm 48.8由InternImage-XL配合Cascade Mask R-CNN获得，至少比对应模型高1.1个点。

items.en: To further push the performance bound of object detection, we follow the advanced setting used in leading methods [17, 16, 74, 26, 78] to initialize the backbone with the weights pre-trained on ImageNet-22K or the large-scale joint dataset, and double its parameters via the composite techniques [78] (see the model with 2 billion parameters in Fig. 2). Then, we fine-tune it along with the DINO [74] detector on the Objects365 [79] and COCO datasets one after another for 26 epochs and 12 epochs, respectively. As shown in Table 4, our method achieves the best results of 65.0 APbb{}^{\text{b}} and 65.4 APbb{}^{\text{b}} on COCO val2017 and test-dev. Compared to previous state-of-the-art models, we surpass FD-SwinV2-G [26] by 1.2 points (65.4 vs. 64.2), with 27% fewer parameters and without complicated distillation processes, which shows the effectiveness of our models on the detection task.
items.zh: 为进一步推动目标检测的性能边界，我们遵循领先方法[17, 16, 74, 26, 78]中使用的先进设置，使用在ImageNet-22K或大规模联合数据集上预训练的权重初始化主干，并通过复合技术[78]将其参数加倍（见图2中20亿参数的模型）。然后，我们将其与DINO[74]检测器一起在Objects365[79]和COCO数据集上依次微调26个epoch和12个epoch。如表4所示，我们的方法在COCO val2017和test-dev上分别达到65.0 APb和65.4 APb的最佳结果。与先前最先进模型相比，我们以少27%的参数且无需复杂蒸馏过程，超过FD-SwinV2-G[26] 1.2个点（65.4 vs. 64.2），显示了我们的模型在检测任务上的有效性。

items.en: Settings. To evaluate the semantic segmentation performance of InternImage, we initialize the backbone with pre-trained classification weights and train our models with UperNet [81] on ADE20K [82] for 160k iterations and compare fairly with previous CNN-based and transformer-based backbones. To further reach top performance, we arm InternImage-H with more advanced Mask2Former [80], and adopt the same training settings in [69, 17].
items.zh: 设置。为评估InternImage的语义分割性能，我们使用预训练的分类权重初始化主干，并在ADE20K[82]上使用UperNet[81]训练模型160k次迭代，与先前基于CNN和基于Transformer的主干进行公平比较。为进一步达到顶级性能，我们为InternImage-H配备更先进的Mask2Former[80]，并采用与[69, 17]相同的训练设置。

items.en: Results. As shown in Table 5, when using UperNet [81] for semantic segmentation, our InternImage consistently outperforms prior arts [2, 21, 29, 22]. For example, with almost the same parameter numbers and FLOPs, our InternImage-B reports 50.8 mIoU on the ADE20K val, which is outstanding from the strong counterparts such as ConvNeXt-B (50.8 vs. 49.1) and RepLKNet-31B (50.8 vs. 49.9). Furthermore, our InternImage-H yields 60.3 MS mIoU, which is better than SwinV2-G [16], while the parameter number is much smaller (1.12B vs. 3.00B).
items.zh: 结果。如表5所示，当使用UperNet [81]进行语义分割时，我们的InternImage始终优于先前的方法[2, 21, 29, 22]。例如，在参数数量和FLOPs几乎相同的情况下，我们的InternImage-B在ADE20K验证集上报告了50.8 mIoU，这优于强大的对应模型如ConvNeXt-B（50.8 vs. 49.1）和RepLKNet-31B（50.8 vs. 49.9）。此外，我们的InternImage-H产生了60.3 MS mIoU，优于SwinV2-G [16]，而参数数量要小得多（1.12B vs. 3.00B）。

items.en: It is worth noting that, when using Mask2Former [80] and multi-scale testing, our InternImage-H achieves the best mIoU of 62.9, higher than the current best BEiT-3 [17] on the ADE20K benchmark. These results demonstrate that the CNN-based foundation model can also enjoy the dividends of massive data and challenge the leading position of transformer-based models.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，当使用Mask2Former [80]和多尺度测试时，我们的InternImage-H在ADE20K基准上达到了62.9的最佳mIoU，高于当前最佳的BEiT-3 [17]。这些结果表明，基于CNN的基础模型也能享受海量数据的红利，并挑战基于Transformer的模型的领先地位。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Model parameters and GPU memory usage of shared weights v.s unshared weights among convolution neurons. The left vertical axis indicates the model parameters and the right one indicates the GPU memory usage per image when the batch size is 32 and the input image resolution is 224×224224224224\times 224.
items.capZh: 图4：卷积神经元间共享权重与不共享权重的模型参数和GPU内存使用情况。左纵轴表示模型参数，右纵轴表示当批量大小为32且输入图像分辨率为224×224时每张图像的GPU内存使用量。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Visualization of sampling locations for different groups at different stages. The blue star indicates the query point (on the left sheep), and the dots with different colors indicate the sampling locations of different groups.
items.capZh: 图5：不同阶段不同组的采样位置可视化。蓝色星号表示查询点（左侧羊身上），不同颜色的点表示不同组的采样位置。

items.en: Sharing weights among convolution neurons matters. Large-scale models are sensitive to parameters and memory cost of the core operator, due to hardware limitations. To address this problem, we share weights among convolution neurons of DCNv3. As shown in Fig. 4, we compare the parameters and memory cost of the models based on DCNv3 with shared or unshared weights. We see that the parameters and memory cost of models with unshared weights are much higher than the shared one, especially for the -H scale, the ratio of saved parameters and GPU memory is 42.0% and 84.2%, respectively. As shown in Table 6, we also examine that the two models at -T scale have similar top-1 accuracy on ImageNet (83.5 vs. 83.6) and APbb{}^{\text{b}} on COCO (47.2 vs. 47.4), even the model without shared weights has 66.1% more parameters.
items.zh: 卷积神经元间的权重共享很重要。由于硬件限制，大规模模型对核心算子的参数和内存成本很敏感。为了解决这个问题，我们在DCNv3的卷积神经元之间共享权重。如图4所示，我们比较了基于DCNv3的模型在共享或不共享权重时的参数和内存成本。我们看到，不共享权重的模型的参数和内存成本远高于共享权重的模型，特别是在-H规模下，节省的参数和GPU内存比例分别为42.0%和84.2%。如表6所示，我们还检验了-T规模下的两个模型在ImageNet上的top-1准确率（83.5 vs. 83.6）和COCO上的AP^b（47.2 vs. 47.4）相似，即使不共享权重的模型参数多了66.1%。

items.en: Multi-group spatial aggregation brings stronger features. We introduce aggregation groups to allow our model to learn information from different representation subspaces like transformers [9]. As shown in Fig. 5, for the same query pixel, the offsets from different groups are concentrated in different regions, resulting in hierarchical semantic features. We also compare the performance of the model with and without multiple groups. As reported in Table 6, the model significantly drops 1.2 points on ImageNet and 3.4 points on COCO val2017. In addition, we also see that in the first two stages, the learned effective receptive field (ERF) is relatively small, and as the model goes deeper (i.e., stages 3 and 4), the ERF increases to be global. This phenomenon is different from ViTs [9, 10, 83] whose ERF is usually global.
items.zh: 多组空间聚合带来更强的特征。我们引入聚合组，使模型能够像Transformer [9]一样从不同的表示子空间学习信息。如图5所示，对于相同的查询像素，不同组的偏移集中在不同区域，从而产生层次化的语义特征。我们还比较了有无多组的模型性能。如表6所示，模型在ImageNet上下降了1.2个点，在COCO val2017上下降了3.4个点。此外，我们还看到在前两个阶段，学习到的有效感受野（ERF）相对较小，随着模型加深（即阶段3和4），ERF增大到全局。这一现象与ViTs [9, 10, 83]不同，后者的ERF通常是全局的。

items.en: We introduce InternImage, a new large-scale CNN-based foundation model that can provide strong representations for versatile vision tasks, such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. We tune the flexible DCNv2 operator to satisfy the requirement of foundation models, and develop a series of blocks, stacking and scaling rules centered on the core operator. Extensive experiments on object detection and semantic segmentation benchmarks verify that our InternImage can obtain comparable or better performance than well-designed large-scale vision transformers trained with massive data, showing that CNN is also a considerable choice for large-scale vision foundation model research. Nonetheless, latency remains an issue for DCN-based operators adapting to downstream tasks with high-speed requirements. Also, large-scale CNNs are still in their early stages of development, and we hope InternImage can serve as a good starting point.
items.zh: 我们介绍了InternImage，一种新的基于CNN的大规模基础模型，能够为多种视觉任务（如图像分类、目标检测和语义分割）提供强大的表示。我们调整了灵活的DCNv2算子以满足基础模型的要求，并开发了一系列以核心算子为中心的块、堆叠和缩放规则。在目标检测和语义分割基准上的大量实验验证了我们的InternImage可以获得与使用海量数据训练的设计良好的大规模视觉Transformer相当或更好的性能，表明CNN也是大规模视觉基础模型研究的可行选择。尽管如此，对于具有高速要求的下游任务，基于DCN的算子的延迟仍然是一个问题。此外，大规模CNN仍处于早期发展阶段，我们希望InternImage能成为一个好的起点。

full.secZh: 附录A 详细训练设置

items.en: In this section, we present the detailed training recipes for image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍了图像分类、目标检测和语义分割的详细训练方案。

full.secZh: A.1 骨干网络对比设置

items.en: ImageNet image classification. The training details of image classification on ImageNet [31] are shown in Table 7, which are similar to common practices [2, 64, 58, 21] and with some tweaks. To further explore the capability of our model and match the large-scale private data used in previous methods [20, 16, 59], we adopt M3I Pre-training [60], a unified pre-training approach available for both unlabeled and weakly-labeled data, to pre-train InternImage-H on a 427 million joint dataset of public Laion-400M [61], YFCC-15M [62], and CC12M [63] for 30 epochs, and then we fine-tune the model on ImageNet-1K for 20 epochs. For the more detailed pre-training settings of InternImage-H, please refer to M3I Pre-training [60].
items.zh: ImageNet图像分类。ImageNet [31]上图像分类的训练细节如表7所示，与常见做法[2, 64, 58, 21]相似并有一些调整。为了进一步探索我们模型的能力并与先前方法[20, 16, 59]中使用的大规模私有数据匹配，我们采用M3I预训练[60]，这是一种适用于无标签和弱标签数据的统一预训练方法，在包含4.27亿张图像的公共数据集Laion-400M [61]、YFCC-15M [62]和CC12M [63]上预训练InternImage-H 30个epoch，然后在ImageNet-1K上微调20个epoch。关于InternImage-H更详细的预训练设置，请参考M3I预训练[60]。

items.en: COCO object detection. We verify the detection performance of our InternImage on the COCO benchmark [32], on top of Mask R-CNN [70] and Cascade Mask R-CNN [71]. For fair comparisons, we follow common practices [2, 11] to initialize the backbone with pre-trained classification weights, and train these models using a 1×\times (12 epochs) or 3×\times (36 epochs) schedule by default. For 1×\times schedule, the image is resized to have a shorter side of 800 pixels, while the longer side does not exceed 1,333 pixels. During testing, the shorter side of the input image is fixed to 800 pixels. For 3×\times schedule, the shorter side is resized to 480−-800 pixels, while the longer side does not exceed 1,333 pixels. All these detection models are trained with a batch size of 16 and optimized by AdamW [84] with an initial learning rate of 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4}.
items.zh: COCO目标检测。我们在COCO基准[32]上验证了InternImage的检测性能，基于Mask R-CNN [70]和Cascade Mask R-CNN [71]。为了公平比较，我们遵循常见做法[2, 11]，使用预训练的分类权重初始化骨干网络，并使用1×（12个epoch）或3×（36个epoch）计划训练这些模型。对于1×计划，图像被调整为短边800像素，长边不超过1333像素。测试时，输入图像的短边固定为800像素。对于3×计划，短边调整为480-800像素，长边不超过1333像素。所有检测模型使用批量大小16和AdamW [84]优化器训练，初始学习率为1×10^{-4}。

items.en: ADE20K semantic segmentation. We evaluate our InternImage models on the ADE20K dataset [82], and initialize them with the pre-trained classification weights. For the InternImage-T/S/B models, we optimize them using AdamW [84] with an initial learning rate of 6×10−5absentsuperscript105\times 10^{-5}, and 2×10−5absentsuperscript105\times 10^{-5} for InternImage-X/XL. The learning rate is decayed following the polynomial decay schedule with a power of 1.0. Following previous methods [2, 11, 21], the crop size is set to 512 for InternImage-T/S/B, and 640 for InternImage-L/XL. All segmentation models are trained using UperNet [81] with a batch size of 16 for 160k iterations, and compared fairly with previous CNN-based and transformer-based backbones.
items.zh: ADE20K语义分割。我们在ADE20K数据集[82]上评估了InternImage模型，并使用预训练的分类权重初始化。对于InternImage-T/S/B模型，我们使用AdamW [84]优化器，初始学习率为6×10^{-5}，对于InternImage-X/XL，初始学习率为2×10^{-5}。学习率按照多项式衰减计划衰减，幂次为1.0。遵循先前方法[2, 11, 21]，对于InternImage-T/S/B，裁剪大小设置为512，对于InternImage-L/XL，设置为640。所有分割模型使用UperNet [81]训练，批量大小为16，迭代160k次，并与先前基于CNN和Transformer的骨干网络进行公平比较。

items.en: COCO object detection. For system-level comparison with state-of-the-art large-scale detection models [17, 16, 74, 26, 78], we first initialize the InternImage-XL/H backbone with the weights pre-trained on ImageNet-22K or the 427M large-scale joint dataset, and double its parameters using the composite techniques [78]. Then, we pre-train the model along with the DINO [74] detector on the Objects365 [79] for 26 epochs, with an initial learning rate of 2×10−42superscript1042\times 10^{-4} and a batch size of 256. The shorter size of input images is resized to 600−-1200 pixels during pre-training, and the learning rate drops by 10 times at epoch 22. Finally, we fine-tune these detectors on the COCO dataset for 12 epochs, where the batch size is 64, and the initial learning rate is 5×10−55superscript1055\times 10^{-5}, which drops by 10 times at the final epoch.
items.zh: COCO目标检测。为了与最先进的大规模检测模型[17, 16, 74, 26, 78]进行系统级比较，我们首先使用在ImageNet-22K或4.27亿大规模联合数据集上预训练的权重初始化InternImage-XL/H骨干网络，并使用复合技术[78]将其参数加倍。然后，我们使用DINO [74]检测器在Objects365 [79]上预训练模型26个epoch，初始学习率为2×10^{-4}，批量大小为256。预训练期间输入图像的短边调整为600-1200像素，学习率在第22个epoch下降10倍。最后，我们在COCO数据集上微调这些检测器12个epoch，批量大小为64，初始学习率为5×10^{-5}，在最后一个epoch下降10倍。

items.en: ADE20K semantic segmentation. To further reach leading segmentation performance, we first initialize our InternImage-H backbone with the pre-trained weights on the 427M large-scale joint dataset, and arm it with the state-of-the-art segmentation method Mask2Former [80]. We follow the same training settings in [69, 17], i.e. pre-training and fine-tuning the model on COCO-Stuff [85] and ADE20K [82] datasets both for 80k iterations, with a crop size of 896 and an initial learning rate of 1×10−5absentsuperscript105\times 10^{-5}.
items.zh: ADE20K语义分割。为了进一步达到领先的分割性能，我们首先使用在4.27亿大规模联合数据集上预训练的权重初始化InternImage-H骨干网络，并使用最先进的分割方法Mask2Former [80]。我们遵循[69, 17]中的相同训练设置，即在COCO-Stuff [85]和ADE20K [82]数据集上分别预训练和微调模型80k次迭代，裁剪大小为896，初始学习率为1×10^{-5}。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Comparison of different stacking hyper-parameters. Each square indicates the accuracy of the model determined by hyperparameter, with the darker the color, the higher the accuracy.
items.capZh: 图6：不同堆叠超参数的比较。每个方块表示由超参数确定的模型准确率，颜色越深，准确率越高。

items.en: As discussed in Section 3.2, our model is constructed in four stacking rules, and we further restrict the model parameters to 30M for the origin model. We discretize the stacking hyperparameters C1subscript𝐶1C_{1} to {16,32,64}163264\{16,32,64\}, L1subscript𝐿1L_{1} to {1,2,3,4,5}12345\{1,2,3,4,5\}, and C′superscript𝐶′C^{\prime} to {16,32}1632\{16,32\}. And L2subscript𝐿2L_{2} is determined by selecting the model size to approximately 30M. In this way, we obtained 30 models by combining the three hyper-parameters.
items.zh: 如第3.2节所述，我们的模型按照四个堆叠规则构建，我们进一步将原始模型的参数限制为30M。我们将堆叠超参数C_1离散化为{16,32,64}，L_1为{1,2,3,4,5}，C'为{16,32}。L_2通过选择模型大小约为30M来确定。通过这种方式，我们组合三个超参数得到了30个模型。

items.en: We adopt the training recipe listed in Table 7 to train our -T models unless otherwise stated. Fig. 6 shows the ImageNet-1K top-1 accuracy of these models under the same training settings, with darker green indicating higher accuracy, i.e., models with stronger representational capability. When C′superscript𝐶′C^{\prime} equals 16, models are generally higher than that with C′superscript𝐶′C^{\prime} of 32, and L1subscript𝐿1L_{1} works best at 4, thanks to a reasonable stacking ratio. A large number of channels allows for more gain. Finally, through the above exploration experiments, we determine our basic stacking hyper-parameter (C1,C′,L1,L3)subscript𝐶1superscript𝐶′subscript𝐿1subscript𝐿3(C_{1},C^{\prime},L_{1},L_{3}) to (64,16,4,18)6416418(64,16,4,18).
items.zh: 除非另有说明，我们采用表7中列出的训练方案来训练我们的-T模型。图6显示了这些模型在相同训练设置下的ImageNet-1K top-1准确率，深绿色表示更高的准确率，即表示能力更强的模型。当C'等于16时，模型通常比C'为32时准确率更高，L_1在4时效果最好，这归功于合理的堆叠比例。大量的通道允许更多的增益。最后，通过上述探索实验，我们确定了基本的堆叠超参数(C_1, C', L_1, L_3)为(64,16,4,18)。

items.en: In Section 3.2, we have shown the constraints on the depth scaling factor α𝛼\alpha and the width scaling factor β𝛽\beta. Based on this condition and the -T model (30M), we display reasonable scaling possibilities for extending the -T model to -B models (100M). As illustrated in Table 8, the first two columns show the formulas for α𝛼\alpha and β𝛽\beta. The penultimate column indicates model parameters, and the last column indicates the ImageNet-1K top-1 accuracy of these models after 300 training epochs.
items.zh: 在第3.2节中，我们展示了深度缩放因子α和宽度缩放因子β的约束条件。基于这个条件和-T模型（30M），我们展示了将-T模型扩展到-B模型（100M）的合理缩放可能性。如表8所示，前两列显示了α和β的公式。倒数第二列表示模型参数，最后一列表示这些模型在300个训练epoch后的ImageNet-1K top-1准确率。

items.en: It is worth noting that the model width C1subscript𝐶1C_{1} needs to be divisible by C′superscript𝐶′C^{\prime}. Therefore some adjustment is required in determining the specific scaling parameters. This results in a small fluctuation in the number of parameters, but this is acceptable. Our exploratory experiments prove that when (α,β)𝛼𝛽(\alpha,\beta) is set at (1.09,1.36)1.091.36(1.09,1.36) for the best performance. In addition, the other size models -S/L/XL/H also confirmed the effectiveness of our scaling rules.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，模型宽度C_1需要能被C'整除。因此在确定具体缩放参数时需要一些调整。这导致参数数量的小幅波动，但这是可以接受的。我们的探索实验证明，当(α, β)设置为(1.09,1.36)时性能最佳。此外，其他大小的模型-S/L/XL/H也证实了我们缩放规则的有效性。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Visualization of the effective receptive field (ERF) of different backbones. The activated pixel is at dog’s eye. (a) and (b) shows the ERF of ResNet-101 [36] with (w/) and without (w/o) training on ImageNet-1K [31], respectively. (c) and (d) are the ERF of InternImage-B with (w/) and without (w/o) training on ImageNet-1K.
items.capZh: 图7：不同骨干网络的有效感受野（ERF）可视化。激活像素位于狗的眼睛。(a)和(b)分别显示了ResNet-101 [36]在ImageNet-1K [31]上训练（w/）和未训练（w/o）的ERF。(c)和(d)是InternImage-B在ImageNet-1K上训练（w/）和未训练（w/o）的ERF。

items.en: As mentioned in Section 3.1, we argue 3×\times3 dynamic sparse convolution is enough for the large receptive field. Here, we explore the role played by the number of convolutional neurons in the DCNv3 operator. Specifically, we replaced the 3×3333\times 3 kernel in the DCNv3 operator with the 5×5555\times 5 or 7×7777\times 7 kernel. They are all trained by the -T training recipes (see Table 7) and validated on the ImageNet-1K validation set. The results are shown in Table 9.
items.zh: 如第3.1节所述，我们认为3×3动态稀疏卷积对于大感受野已经足够。这里，我们探讨了DCNv3算子中卷积神经元数量所起的作用。具体来说，我们将DCNv3算子中的3×3核替换为5×5或7×7核。它们都使用-T训练方案（见表7）训练，并在ImageNet-1K验证集上验证。结果如表9所示。

items.en: The results show that when enlarging the convolution kernel, the parameters and FLOPs are followed by the surge, while the accuracy is not significantly improved (83.5 v.s 83.6) or even decreased (83.5 v.s 82.8). These results show that when the number of convolutional neurons in a single layer increases, the model becomes more difficult to optimize. This phenomenon is also confirmed in RepLKNet [22], and it addresses this problem by re-parameterizing [22] techniques, which might bring extra time and memory costs in the training phase. In this work, we avoid this problem by adopting the simple yet effective 3×3333\times 3 DCNv3 as InternImage’s core operator.
items.zh: 结果表明，当扩大卷积核时，参数和FLOPs随之激增，而精度并未显著提升（83.5 vs 83.6）甚至下降（83.5 vs 82.8）。这些结果表明，当单层卷积神经元数量增加时，模型更难优化。这一现象也在RepLKNet [22]中得到证实，该工作通过重参数化 [22]技术解决了这一问题，但这可能会在训练阶段带来额外的时间和内存成本。在本工作中，我们采用简单而有效的3×3 DCNv3作为InternImage的核心算子来避免这一问题。

items.en: Fig. 7 shows the effective receptive fields (ERF) of ResNet-101 [36] and InternImage-S. A wider distribution of bright areas indicates a larger ERF. We uniformly activate the input image at the dog’s eye, count the gradient map of each block, aggregate by channel, and map back to the input image. We see that the ERF of ResNet-101 [36] without training is limited to a local area, while the fully trained ResNet-101 still has an ERF around the eye, and the gradient amplitude is lower, and the distribution is more sparse. Therefore, the area that ResNet-101 can effectively perceive is very limited. For the InternImage-S without training, its ERF is concentrated around the activation point. Since the offset is not learned, its ERF is also very small in the last two blocks. But after sufficient training, InternImage-L can effectively perceive the information of the entire image in the 3-rd and 4-th stages.
items.zh: 图7展示了ResNet-101 [36]和InternImage-S的有效感受野（ERF）。明亮区域分布更广表示ERF更大。我们在狗的眼睛处统一激活输入图像，统计每个块的梯度图，按通道聚合，并映射回输入图像。我们看到，未经训练的ResNet-101 [36]的ERF局限于局部区域，而经过充分训练的ResNet-101的ERF仍然集中在眼睛周围，且梯度幅度更低，分布更稀疏。因此，ResNet-101能够有效感知的区域非常有限。对于未经训练的InternImage-S，其ERF集中在激活点附近。由于偏移量未学习，其最后两个块的ERF也非常小。但经过充分训练后，InternImage-L能够在第3和第4阶段有效感知整个图像的信息。

items.en: iNaturalist 2018 [98] is a read-word long-tailed dataset containing 8142 fine-graned species. The dataset comprises 437.5K training images and an imbalance factor of 500. For this experiment, we initialize our InternImage-H model with the pre-trained weights on the 427M large-scale joint dataset, and fine-tune it on the training set of iNaturalist 2018 for 100 epochs. We follow MetaFormer [86] to adopt a resolution of 384×\times384 for fine-tuning, with the utilization of meta information. Other training settings are the same as the recipe for fine-tuning InternImage-H on ImageNet-1K, as reported in Table 7. As a result, our method achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy of 92.6 (see Table 10) on the validation set of iNaturalist 2018, 3.9 points better than the previous best model MetaFormer [86].
items.zh: iNaturalist 2018 [98]是一个真实世界长尾数据集，包含8142个细粒度物种。该数据集包含437.5K张训练图像，不平衡因子为500。在本实验中，我们使用在427M大规模联合数据集上预训练的权重初始化InternImage-H模型，并在iNaturalist 2018训练集上微调100个epoch。我们遵循MetaFormer [86]采用384×384分辨率进行微调，并利用元信息。其他训练设置与表7中报告的在ImageNet-1K上微调InternImage-H的配置相同。最终，我们的方法在iNaturalist 2018验证集上达到了92.6的最先进准确率（见表10），比之前的最佳模型MetaFormer [86]高出3.9个百分点。

items.en: Places205 [99] is a dataset containing 2.5 million images of 205 scene categories, which are dedicated to the scene recognition task. The images in this dataset cover a wide range of indoor and outdoor scenes, such as offices, kitchens, forests, and beaches. We initialize our model with pre-trained weights on a large-scale joint dataset, consisting of 427 million images, and fine-tune it on the Places205 training set. Other training settings are the same as the recipe for fine-tuning InternImage-H on ImageNet-1K, as reported in Table 7. Our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy of 71.7 (see Table 10) on the validation set of Places205, outperforming the previous best model MixMIM-L [87] by 2.4 points.
items.zh: Places205 [99]是一个包含205个场景类别、250万张图像的数据集，专用于场景识别任务。该数据集中的图像涵盖了广泛的室内外场景，如办公室、厨房、森林和海滩。我们使用在大规模联合数据集（包含4.27亿张图像）上预训练的权重初始化模型，并在Places205训练集上进行微调。其他训练设置与表7中报告的在ImageNet-1K上微调InternImage-H的配置相同。我们的方法在Places205验证集上达到了71.7的最先进准确率（见表10），比之前的最佳模型MixMIM-L [87]高出2.4个百分点。

items.en: Places365 [100] is a dataset containing 1.8 million images of 365 scene categories, which are dedicated to the scene recognition task. The images in this dataset cover a wide range of indoor and outdoor scenes, such as airports, bedrooms, deserts, and waterfalls. The specific pre-training and fine-tuning strategies are the same as for Places205. Our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy of 61.2 (see Table 10) on the validation set of Places365, outperforming the previous best model SWAG [88] by 0.5 points. The Places365 dataset provides a more fine-grained classification task compared to Places205, allowing our model to learn more subtle differences between similar scenes.
items.zh: Places365 [100]是一个包含365个场景类别、180万张图像的数据集，专用于场景识别任务。该数据集中的图像涵盖了广泛的室内外场景，如机场、卧室、沙漠和瀑布。具体的预训练和微调策略与Places205相同。我们的方法在Places365验证集上达到了61.2的最先进准确率（见表10），比之前的最佳模型SWAG [88]高出0.5个百分点。与Places205相比，Places365数据集提供了更细粒度的分类任务，使我们的模型能够学习相似场景之间更细微的差异。

items.en: LVIS v1.0 [101] is a large-scale vocabulary dataset for object detection and instance segmentation tasks, which contains 1203 categories in 164k images. For this dataset, we initialize our InternImage-H with the Objects365 [79] pre-trained weights, then fine-tune it on the training set of LVIS v1.0. Here, we report the box AP (i.e., APb) with multi-scale testing on the minival set and the val set, respectively. As shown in Table 10, our InternImage-H creates a new record of 65.8 APb on the LVIS minival, and 63.2 APb on the LVIS val, outperforming previous state-of-the-art methods by clear margins.
items.zh: LVIS v1.0 [101]是一个用于目标检测和实例分割任务的大规模词汇数据集，包含164k张图像中的1203个类别。对于该数据集，我们使用Objects365 [79]预训练权重初始化InternImage-H，然后在LVIS v1.0训练集上进行微调。这里，我们分别报告了在minival集和val集上使用多尺度测试的框AP（即APb）。如表10所示，我们的InternImage-H在LVIS minival上创造了65.8 APb的新纪录，在LVIS val上达到63.2 APb，以明显优势超越了之前的最先进方法。

items.en: Pascal VOC [102] contains 20 object classes, which has been widely used as a benchmark for object detection tasks. We adopt this dataset to further evaluate the detection performance of our model. Specifically, we employ the Objects365 [79] pre-trained weights to initialize our InternImage-H, and fine-tune it on the trainval set of Pascal VOC 2007 and Pascal VOC 2012 following previous method [93]. As shown in Table 10, on the Pascal VOC 2007 test set, our InternImage-H yields 94.0 AP50 with single-scale testing, which is 4.7 points better than previous best Cascade Eff-B7 NAS-FPN [93]. On the Pascal VOC 2012 test set, our method achieves 97.2 mAP, 4.3 points higher than the best record on the official leaderboard [94].
items.zh: Pascal VOC [102]包含20个目标类别，已被广泛用作目标检测任务的基准。我们采用该数据集进一步评估模型的检测性能。具体来说，我们使用Objects365 [79]预训练权重初始化InternImage-H，并按照先前方法[93]在Pascal VOC 2007和Pascal VOC 2012的trainval集上进行微调。如表10所示，在Pascal VOC 2007测试集上，我们的InternImage-H使用单尺度测试达到了94.0 AP50，比之前的最佳Cascade Eff-B7 NAS-FPN [93]高出4.7个百分点。在Pascal VOC 2012测试集上，我们的方法达到了97.2 mAP，比官方排行榜上的最佳记录[94]高出4.3个百分点。

items.en: OpenImages v6 [103] is a dataset of about 9 million images with 16M bounding boxes for 600 object classes on 1.9 million images dedicated to the object detection task, which are very diverse and often embrace complex scenes with multiple objects (8.3 per image on average). For this dataset, we use the same settings as the previous two datasets. In addition, we follow [95] to use the class-aware sampling during fine-tuning. As reported in Table 10, our InternImage-H yields 74.1 mAP, achieving 1.9 mAP improvement compared to the previous best results [95].
items.zh: OpenImages v6 [103]是一个包含约900万张图像的数据集，其中190万张图像上有1600万个边界框，涵盖600个目标类别，专用于目标检测任务。这些图像非常多样化，通常包含多个目标的复杂场景（平均每张图像8.3个目标）。对于该数据集，我们使用与前两个数据集相同的设置。此外，我们遵循[95]在微调过程中使用类别感知采样。如表10所示，我们的InternImage-H达到了74.1 mAP，与之前的最佳结果[95]相比提升了1.9 mAP。

items.en: CrownHuman [104] is a benchmark dataset to better evaluate detectors in crowd scenarios. The CrowdHuman dataset is large, rich-annotated and contains high diversity. CrowdHuman contains 15000, 4370 and 5000 images for training, validation, and testing, respectively. There are a total of 470K human instances from train and validation subsets and 23 persons per image, with various kinds of occlusions in the dataset. We used the same training setup as for the previous dataset. Our pre-trained model reached optimal performance in 3750 iterations, exceeding the previous best model Iter-Deformable-DETR [96] by 3.1 AP.
items.zh: CrowdHuman [104]是一个用于更好评估拥挤场景中检测器的基准数据集。CrowdHuman数据集规模大、标注丰富且具有高度多样性。CrowdHuman包含15000、4370和5000张图像分别用于训练、验证和测试。训练和验证子集中共有47万个人体实例，每张图像平均23人，数据集中存在各种遮挡。我们使用与之前数据集相同的训练设置。我们的预训练模型在3750次迭代时达到最佳性能，超过之前的最佳模型Iter-Deformable-DETR [96] 3.1 AP。

items.en: BDD100K [105] is a dataset of around 100K high-resolution images with diverse weather and lighting conditions, containing 10 object categories, including pedestrians, cars, buses, and bicycles, dedicated to the object detection task. The images in this dataset are captured from a moving vehicle, simulating real-world scenarios. For this experiment, we initialize our InternImage-H model with the pre-trained weights on the 427M joint dataset and fine-tune it on the BDD100K training set for 12 epochs. As reported in Table 10, our InternImage-H achieves 38.8 mAP on the validation set, which is the state-of-the-art performance, surpassing the previous best model by 3.2 mAP. Our method demonstrates superior performance in detecting objects in real-world driving scenarios, which can benefit autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems.
items.zh: BDD100K [105]是一个包含约10万张高分辨率图像的数据集，具有多样的天气和光照条件，包含10个目标类别，包括行人、汽车、公交车和自行车，专用于目标检测任务。该数据集中的图像是从行驶的车辆上拍摄的，模拟真实世界场景。在本实验中，我们使用在427M联合数据集上预训练的权重初始化InternImage-H模型，并在BDD100K训练集上微调12个epoch。如表10所示，我们的InternImage-H在验证集上达到了38.8 mAP，这是最先进的性能，超越了之前的最佳模型3.2 mAP。我们的方法在检测真实驾驶场景中的目标方面表现出优越性能，这有助于自动驾驶和智能交通系统。

items.en: COCO-Stuff [85] includes the images from the COCO [32] dataset for semantic segmentation, spanning over 171 categories. Specifically, COCO-Stuff-164K is the full set that contains all 164k images, while COCO-Stuff-10K is a subset of the -164K that splits into 9,000 and 1,000 images for training and testing. Here, we equip our InternImage-H with the advanced Mask2Former [80], and pre-train the model on the COCO-Stuff-164K for 80k iterations. Then we fine-tune it on the COCO-Stuff-10K for 40k iterations and report the multi-scale mIoU. The crop size is set to 512×\times512 in this experiment. As shown in Table 10, our model achieves 59.6 MS mIoU on the test set, outperforming the previous best ViT-Adapter [69] by 5.4 mIoU.
items.zh: COCO-Stuff [85]包含来自COCO [32]数据集的图像，用于语义分割，涵盖171个类别。具体来说，COCO-Stuff-164K是包含所有164k张图像的完整集，而COCO-Stuff-10K是-164K的一个子集，分为9000张训练图像和1000张测试图像。这里，我们为InternImage-H配备先进的Mask2Former [80]，并在COCO-Stuff-164K上预训练80k次迭代。然后在COCO-Stuff-10K上微调40k次迭代，并报告多尺度mIoU。本实验中裁剪尺寸设置为512×512。如表10所示，我们的模型在测试集上达到了59.6 MS mIoU，超越了之前的最佳ViT-Adapter [69] 5.4 mIoU。

items.en: Pascal Context [106] contains 59 semantic classes. It is divided into 4,996 images for training and 5,104 images for testing. For this dataset, we also employ Mask2Former with our InternImage-H, and follow the training settings in [69]. Specifically, we first load the classification pre-trained weights to initialize the model, then fine-tune it on the training set of Pascal Context for 40k iterations. The crop size is set to 480×\times480 in this experiment. As shown in Table 10, our method reports 70.3 MS mIoU on the test set, which is 2.1 points better than ViT-Adapter [69].
items.zh: Pascal Context [106]包含59个语义类别。它分为4996张训练图像和5104张测试图像。对于该数据集，我们同样使用Mask2Former与我们的InternImage-H，并遵循[69]中的训练设置。具体来说，我们首先加载分类预训练权重来初始化模型，然后在Pascal Context训练集上微调40k次迭代。本实验中裁剪尺寸设置为480×480。如表10所示，我们的方法在测试集上报告了70.3 MS mIoU，比ViT-Adapter [69]高出2.1个百分点。

items.en: Cityscapes [107] is a high-resolution dataset recorded in street scenes including 19 classes. In this experiment, we use Mask2Former [80] as the segmentation framework. Following common practices [108, 83, 69], we first pre-train on Mapillary Vistas [109] and then fine-tune on Cityscapes for 80k iterations, respectively. The crop size is set to 1024×\times1024 in this experiment. As shown in Table 10, our InternImage-H achieves 87.0 MS mIoU on the validation set, and 86.1 MS mIoU on the test set.
items.zh: Cityscapes [107]是一个在街景中记录的高分辨率数据集，包含19个类别。在本实验中，我们使用Mask2Former [80]作为分割框架。遵循常见做法[108, 83, 69]，我们首先在Mapillary Vistas [109]上预训练，然后在Cityscapes上分别微调80k次迭代。本实验中裁剪尺寸设置为1024×1024。如表10所示，我们的InternImage-H在验证集上达到了87.0 MS mIoU，在测试集上达到了86.1 MS mIoU。

items.en: NYU Depth V2 [110] comprises of 1449 RGB-D images, each with a size of 640×\times480. These images are divided into 795 training and 654 testing images, each with annotations on 40 semantic categories. We adopt the same training settings as we used when fine-tuning on Pascal Context. As shown in Table 10, our method achieves a big jump to 68.1 MS mIoU on the validation set, which is 11.2 points better than CMX-B5 [90].
items.zh: NYU Depth V2 [110]包含1449张RGB-D图像，每张尺寸为640×480。这些图像分为795张训练图像和654张测试图像，每张图像有40个语义类别的标注。我们采用与在Pascal Context上微调时相同的训练设置。如表10所示，我们的方法在验证集上大幅提升至68.1 MS mIoU，比CMX-B5 [90]高出11.2个百分点。

items.en: In this section, we benchmark the throughput of our InternImage with counterparts, including a variant equipped with DCNv2 [28], ConvNext [21], RepLKNet [22], and a vision transformer with deformable attention (DAT) [46]. As shown in Table 11, compared to the variant with DCNv2 [28], our model enjoys better parameter-efficient and significantly faster inference speed under both 224×\times224 and 800×\times800 input resolutions. Compared to RepLKNet-B [22] and DAT-B [46], our model has a throughput advantage at a high input resolution (i.e., 800×\times800). This resolution is widely used in dense prediction tasks such as object detection. Compared with ConvNeXt [21], despite the throughput gap due to DCN-based operators, our model still has an accuracy advantage (84.9 vs. 83.8), and we are also looking for an efficient DCN to make our model more suitable for downstream tasks that require high efficiency.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们对比了InternImage及其对应模型的吞吐量，包括配备DCNv2 [28]的变体、ConvNext [21]、RepLKNet [22]以及具有可变形注意力的视觉Transformer（DAT）[46]。如表11所示，与配备DCNv2 [28]的变体相比，我们的模型在224×224和800×800两种输入分辨率下都具有更好的参数效率和显著更快的推理速度。与RepLKNet-B [22]和DAT-B [46]相比，我们的模型在高输入分辨率（即800×800）下具有吞吐量优势。该分辨率广泛用于密集预测任务，如目标检测。与ConvNeXt [21]相比，尽管由于基于DCN的算子存在吞吐量差距，但我们的模型仍具有精度优势（84.9 vs 83.8），并且我们也在寻找高效的DCN，以使我们的模型更适合需要高效率的下游任务。

full.sec: Appendix E Robustness Evaluation on ImageNet

items.capEn: Figure 8: Comparison of robust evaluation of different methods. These results show that our model has better robustness in terms of translation, rotation, and input resolution.
items.capZh: 图8：不同方法的鲁棒性评估比较。这些结果表明，我们的模型在平移、旋转和输入分辨率方面具有更好的鲁棒性。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate the robustness of different models under different transformations (see Fig. 8). We consider translation, rotation, and scaling to evaluate. The models we choose for comparison include a convolutional model (ConvNeXt-T [21]), a local attention-based model (Swin-T [2]), a global attention-based model (PVTv2-B2 [11]), and our InternImage-T.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们评估了不同模型在不同变换下的鲁棒性（见图8）。我们考虑平移、旋转和缩放进行评估。我们选择比较的模型包括卷积模型（ConvNeXt-T [21]）、基于局部注意力的模型（Swin-T [2]）、基于全局注意力的模型（PVTv2-B2 [11]）以及我们的InternImage-T。

items.en: Translation invariance describes the capability of the model to retain the original output when the input image is translated. We evaluate the translation invariance in the classification task by dithering the image from 0 to 64 pixels. The invariance is measured by the probability that the model predicts the same label when the same input image is translated. The first row of Fig. 8 indicates our InternImagehas the translation invariance of the different methods. It is evident that the robustness of the four models to translation is shown as our method is the best, followed by convolution-based ConvNeXt, followed by global attention-based PVTv2, and the worst local attention-based Swin transformer.
items.zh: 平移不变性描述了模型在输入图像平移时保持原始输出的能力。我们通过在0到64像素范围内抖动图像来评估分类任务中的平移不变性。不变性通过模型在相同输入图像平移时预测相同标签的概率来衡量。图8的第一行表明，我们的InternImage在不同方法中具有平移不变性。很明显，四种模型对平移的鲁棒性表现为我们的方法最好，其次是基于卷积的ConvNeXt，然后是全局注意力的PVTv2，最差的是局部注意力的Swin Transformer。

items.en: To evaluate the rotation invariance of the classification task, we rotate the image from 0​°0°0\degree to 45​°45°45\degree in steps of 5​°5°5\degree. In a similar way to translation invariance, the predicted consistency under different rotation angles is used to evaluate the rotational invariance. From the second row of Fig. 8, we found that the consistency performance of all models is comparable in the small angle phase. However, at large-angle rotation (i.e., >10​°absent10°>10\degree), our model is clearly superior to the other models.
items.zh: 为了评估分类任务的旋转不变性，我们将图像从0°旋转到45°，步长为5°。与平移不变性类似，使用不同旋转角度下的预测一致性来评估旋转不变性。从图8的第二行，我们发现所有模型在小角度阶段的一致性表现相当。然而，在大角度旋转（即>10°）时，我们的模型明显优于其他模型。

items.en: We evaluate the scaling invariance on object detection. The scaling factor of the input image varies from 0.25 to 3.0 in steps of 0.25. Detection consistency is defined as the invariance metric for the detection task. The predicted boxes on the scaled images are first converted back to the original resolution, and then the predicted boxes at the original resolution are used as the ground truth boxes to calculate the box mAP. As seen in the last row of Fig. 8, we can observe that all methods of our experiments are sensitive to down-scaling. And they show invariance comparable to the input at small resolutions. Our method performs better when scaling up the images. Both box consistency and bounding box mAP are better than the others.
items.zh: 我们在目标检测上评估缩放不变性。输入图像的缩放因子从0.25到3.0变化，步长为0.25。检测一致性被定义为检测任务的不变性度量。首先将缩放图像上的预测框转换回原始分辨率，然后以原始分辨率下的预测框作为真实框计算框mAP。如图8的最后一行所示，我们可以观察到我们实验中的所有方法都对缩小敏感。并且它们在较小分辨率下表现出与输入相当的不变性。我们的方法在放大图像时表现更好。框一致性和边界框mAP都优于其他方法。

full.sec: E.4 How Hungry the Model is for Data Scale?
full.secZh: E.4 模型对数据规模的依赖程度

items.en: In order to verify the robustness of the model to the data scale. We uniformly sampled the ImageNet-1K data to obtain 1%, 10%, and 100% data, respectively. And we chose ResNet-50 [36], ConvNeXt-T [21], Swin-T [2], InternImage-T-dattn and our InternImage-T to conduct 300 rounds of training experiments on these data. The experimental settings are consistent with Table 7. The experimental results can be viewed in Table 12. We see that ResNet [36] performs best on the 1% and 10% data (12.2% & 57.5%), benefiting from its inductive biases. But its upper limitation is low (80.4%) when the data is sufficient. Swin-T fails completely in 1% datasets and shows good performance only on the 100% dataset. The proposed InternImage-T has strong robustness not only on 1% and 10% data (5.9% and 56.0%) but also on full data (83.5%), which is consistently better than the InternImage-T variant with deformable attention (dattn) and ConvNeXt [21]. These results indicate the robustness of our model with respect to the data scale.
items.zh: 为了验证模型对数据规模的鲁棒性，我们均匀采样ImageNet-1K数据，分别获得1%、10%和100%的数据。并选择ResNet-50 [36]、ConvNeXt-T [21]、Swin-T [2]、InternImage-T-dattn以及我们的InternImage-T在这些数据上进行300轮训练实验。实验设置与表7一致。实验结果见表12。我们看到，ResNet [36]在1%和10%数据上表现最佳（12.2%和57.5%），得益于其归纳偏置。但当数据充足时，其上限较低（80.4%）。Swin-T在1%数据集上完全失败，仅在100%数据集上表现良好。所提出的InternImage-T不仅在1%和10%数据上具有强鲁棒性（5.9%和56.0%），而且在完整数据上（83.5%）也一致优于带有可变形注意力（dattn）的InternImage-T变体和ConvNeXt [21]。这些结果表明我们的模型对数据规模具有鲁棒性。
